# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties
broker.id=1  # Broker ID
port=9092    # Listener port, you may change it based on your environment configuration
log.dirs=/data/kafka-logs   # Log directories
num.network.threads=3       # Network thread count for networking I/O
num.io.threads=8             # IO Thread count for handling file operations 
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400  # Socket send buffer size in bytes
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400  # Socket receive buffer size in bytes
num.partitions=3            # Number of partitions for auto-created topics
log.retention.minutes=10    # Log retention period (in minutes)
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181  # Zookeeper connection string, replace with your zookeeper host and port
